last_agent_action: Implemented the first ADF slice locally: canonical JSON artifacts, safe runtime collection, support-baseline HTML rendering, and a meaningful smoke benchmark.
resume_instructions: Read the objective, backlog, and work-state files before editing code.
Restage the build-pack to the saved AlgoSec lab target before the next remote Codex run.
Run the bounded support-baseline command on the lab appliance and review the generated JSON artifacts before expanding scope.
Keep machine-readable artifacts canonical and keep HTML as a thin render layer.
stop_conditions: Stop when the first ADF slice is complete and operator review is the next meaningful action.
Stop and escalate if the next action would require changing registry, deployment pointer, or promotion state directly.
